site_description: Cutting, machining, and heat treatment services for industrial tooling and steel supply in Cikarang.
hero_kicker: Established in 2011 in Delta Silicon II
hero_title: Dedicated steel processing for manufacturers that move fast.
hero_body: Sinar Putra Metalindo provides cutting, machining, and heat treatment services from a strategic industrial location in Lippo Cikarang.
hero_capability_cutting_body: Prepared steel materials for production teams that need reliable lead times.
hero_capability_machining_body: Machining support that helps reduce production waiting time and outside handling.
hero_capability_heat_body: Treatment facilities that improve tooling performance for demanding industrial use.
profile_hero_title: A focused steel distribution partner in the Cikarang industrial corridor.
profile_hero_body: Since 2011, Sinar Putra Metalindo has supported manufacturing teams with practical steel supply, processing, and technical service from Delta Silicon II.
profile_vision_title: Dedicated in steel, delivering innovative solutions for industrial needs.
profile_vision_body: SPM focuses on dependable steel processing solutions that help customers meet production, tooling, and quality requirements.
profile_mission_title: A practical operating culture built around quality, teamwork, and trust.
profile_mission_1: Build a continuous and systematic operating system to support mutual welfare.
profile_mission_2: Build honesty, responsibility, and teamwork across divisions to create innovative and capable people.
profile_mission_3: Provide quality solutions aligned with customer wants and needs.
profile_mission_4: Create innovative relationships by choosing trusted suppliers that help maintain quality and customer trust.
profile_industry_title: Material supply, machining, and heat treatment support in one practical workflow.
profile_industry_body: The profile page on the original site highlights heat treatment coverage and core process support for industrial tooling requirements.
profile_process_raw_material_body: Steel material supply for manufacturers that need dependable availability and documentation.
profile_process_machining_body: Milling and grinding services help customers reduce outside handling and production lead time.
profile_process_heat_treatment_body: Heat treatment capabilities support stronger tooling performance, including hardening and stress relief requirements.
profile_process_heat_treatment_link_intr: Please visit our professional heat treatment sister company website for more detail:
profile_certificate_title: Material documentation to support customer quality requirements.
profile_certificate_body: SPM supports traceability with supplier material certificates from trusted steel makers.
profile_certificate_material_body: SPM provides material certificates to support traceability and procurement documentation.
profile_certificate_quality_body: SPM works with trusted suppliers to help maintain material quality and customer confidence.
intro_title: Built around reliable supply, responsive service, and long-term customer partnerships.
intro_body: SPM believes in continuous expansion to keep pace with rising customer demand. Our teams combine professional support, same-day order processing subject to capacity, and practical technical guidance for production needs.
intro_point_1: Strategic access from Delta Silicon II Industrial Park
intro_point_2: Cutting, milling, grinding, and heat treatment support
intro_point_3: Technical assistance for tooling performance and lead-time planning
services_title: Industrial service designed for production teams.
service_workforce_body: A service culture built on dedication, excellence, and practical partnership with customers.
service_same_day_body: Orders can be processed and prepared for delivery on the same day, depending on daily capacity.
service_machining_body: Milling, grinding, and heat treatment support customers who need shorter lead times and stronger tooling performance.
service_support_body: Experienced support teams assist customers with material, process, and production requirements.
